metadata.description: Deep Suite — structured development, wiki, autonomous experimentation, independent code review, document gardening, and harness diagnostics plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: deep-wiki
plugins.description: LLM-managed markdown wiki — A5 single-source page-level fanout (Stage 1 wiki-synthesizer mode=analysis emits page_plan + sub-threshold inline_bodies; Stage 2 parallel wiki-page-writer workers; Stage 3 main aggregates under lock with mandatory C3 concurrency check) targeting ~15min → ~4min on 295-page wiki + Karpathy 10-15-page synthesis property preserved + new partial_fail sentinel (A1 Step 1.5 cascading + partial-fail-recovery repair_reason + ingest-fail 3-strike force-promote) + optional .config.json (a5_fanout_threshold + a5_worker_timeout_sec) + Step 7.7.A-F failure handling (per-worker / all-fail / mid-loop / C3 abort / timeout / R4 metadata pipeline recovery) + multi-source A4 path byte-identical from v1.3.0

plugins.name: deep-evolve
plugins.description: Autonomous Experimentation Protocol — virtual parallel N-seed, adaptive scheduler, cross-seed borrow, cascade synthesis

plugins.name: deep-review
plugins.description: Independent Evaluator for AI coding agents — cross-model review + Phase 6 subagent delegation

plugins.name: deep-dashboard
plugins.description: Cross-plugin harness diagnostics — harnessability scoring and unified dashboard
